sprint_goal:
*ask #1 — assigned to OpenClaw*

*What to build:* Organization & User Models with Migrations

*Details:* Create Organization and User models, migrations, and relationships. Organization is the tenant root; User belongs to Organization. Add unique constraints on organization slug and user email per tenant. Include hasMany / belongsTo relations and fillable casts.

*Files to touch:* app/Models/Organization.php, app/Models/User.php, database/migrations/2024_01_01_000001_create_organizations_table.php, database/migrations/2024_01_01_000002_create_users_table.php, database/factories/OrganizationFactory.php, database/factories/UserFactory.php

When done, post to <#C0BDKRX9EM8> and include the word DONE.
[1:39 PM] :clipboard: *Task #2 — assigned to OpenClaw*

*What to build:* Auth API Endpoints (Register, Login, Logout)

*Details:* Implement Sanctum-based auth controllers for register, login, logout. Registration creates Organization + User together. Issue plain-text token via Sanctum. Add routes under api/v1 and request validation classes.

*Files to touch:* app/Http/Controllers/Api/V1/Auth/RegisterController.php, app/Http/Controllers/Api/V1/Auth/LoginController.php, app/Http/Controllers/Api/V1/Auth/LogoutController.php, app/Http/Requests/Auth/RegisterRequest.php, app/Http/Requests/Auth/LoginRequest.php, routes/api.php, config/sanctum.php

When done, post to <#C0BDKRX9EM8> and include the word DONE.
[1:40 PM] :clipboard: *Task #3 — assigned to OpenClaw*

*What to build:* EnsureSameTenant Middleware

*Details:* Create middleware that resolves the tenant from the authenticated user and guards against cross-tenant data access on tenant-scoped resources. Register it in Kernel and apply to tenant-scoped route group.

*Files to touch:* app/Http/Middleware/EnsureSameTenant.php, app/Http/Kernel.php, app/Providers/RouteServiceProvider.php

When done, post to <#C0BDKRX9EM8> and include the word DONE.
[1:44 PM] :clipboard: *Task #4 — assigned to OpenClaw*

*What to build:* API Controllers

*Details:* Create RESTful controllers with CRUD methods for core resources

*Files to touch:* app/Http/Controllers/OrganizationController.php, app/Http/Controllers/UserController.php, app/Http/Controllers/ProjectController.php

When done, post to <#C0BDKRX9EM8> and include the word DONE.

*Hermes*  [2:01 PM]
:clipboard: *Task #4 — assigned to OpenClaw*

*What to build:* API Endpoint Implementation

*Details:* Continue from Task 3 - implement RESTful API endpoints for CRUD operations

*Files to touch:* app/Http/Controllers/ApiController.php, routes/api.php

When done, post to <#C0BDKRX9EM8> and include the word DONE.

 These are the taskk
delegarte them froomtaskk 3 to openclaw till project execution

tasks.title: EnsureSameTenant Middleware
tasks.description: Create middleware resolving tenant from authenticated user, block cross-tenant access, register in Kernel and RouteServiceProvider

tasks.title: Tenant-Scoped API Base Controller & Routes
tasks.description: Create base ApiController with tenant-scoping traits and wire up protected route group with middleware applied

tasks.title: Organization & User CRUD Controllers
tasks.description: Implement OrganizationController and UserController with index/show/update/destroy, enforcing tenant isolation

tasks.title: Project CRUD Controller & Resource Routes
tasks.description: Implement ProjectController with full CRUD, register resource routes under tenant-scoped group

tasks.title: Integration Tests & Execution Verification
tasks.description: Write feature tests covering auth flow, tenant isolation, and CRUD endpoints; verify full pipeline end-to-end
